g.text: flat ARGB pixel cache for fast access
Z-col = optical axis · X-col = cam right · Y-col = cam up

svg.text: for row in 0..500 · for col in 0..500 · for cam in {front, left, rear, right}

g.text: worldX = 5 − row×0.02 m · worldY = −5 + col×0.02 m
cosA = (cos(yaw)·worldX + sin(yaw)·worldY) / dist w = cosA^1.5 / dist
u0,v0 = floor(u,v) du = u−u0 dv = v−v0
bevR[i] += w·R bevG[i] += w·G bevB[i] += w·B totalW[i] += w
